# 727a8.com

> Free guide to the Chapter 7 discharge bar under 11 U.S.C. Section 727(a)(8). Learn about the 8-year waiting period between Chapter 7 discharges.

## About

727a8.com explains the 8-year discharge bar under 11 U.S.C. Section 727(a)(8), which prevents a debtor from receiving a Chapter 7 discharge if they received one within the past 8 years. The site covers the filing-date-to-filing-date rule, how to calculate eligibility, exceptions, and what options exist if the waiting period has not elapsed.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://727a8.com/): Complete guide to the 8-year Chapter 7 discharge bar, eligibility calculation, and alternatives

## Network

Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "727a8.com, Bankruptcy Transparency Network (2026)."
